```{=html}
<style>
/* ── Cosmic layout — scoped via body.cosmic-active ──────────────────────
   Background controlled by --cosmic-bg-img CSS variable (set via JS).
   Navbar and sidebar colours are intentionally left unchanged.          */

body.cosmic-active {
  background-color: #020814 !important; /* fallback if image fails */
}

/*
 * Fixed pseudo-element covers the full viewport at all times, regardless of
 * page height, scroll position, or screen orientation — avoids the black
 * gap that appears in portrait mode when background-size:cover is applied
 * directly to body (which scales the image to the body's scrollable height).
 */
body.cosmic-active::before {
  content: '';
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: -1;
  background-color: #020814;
  background-image:
    linear-gradient(var(--cosmic-overlay, rgba(2,6,20,0.28)),
                    var(--cosmic-overlay, rgba(2,6,20,0.28))),
    var(--cosmic-bg-img, none);
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-position: center center;
  background-size: cover;
}

/* ── Full width ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   Three layers to override:
   1. styles.css:    main.content { max-width: 2560px }
   2. Quarto CSS:    body-content column capped at calc(2540px - 4em)
   3. Strategy:      span main.content from body-start → page-end
                     (right of sidebar → right page margin), and hide the
                     empty right TOC sidebar so there is no overlap.       */
body.cosmic-active main.content {
  max-width: 100% !important;
}
body.cosmic-active #quarto-margin-sidebar {
  display: none !important;
}
@media (min-width: 992px) {
  body.cosmic-active main.content,
  body.cosmic-active .page-navigation {
    grid-column: body-start / page-end !important;
    padding-left: 1.5rem !important;   /* gap between sidebar and content */
  }
}

/* transparent pass-through — content area only, NOT navbar or sidebar */
body.cosmic-active #quarto-content,
body.cosmic-active .quarto-container-page,
body.cosmic-active .page-columns,
body.cosmic-active .page-rows-contents,
body.cosmic-active #quarto-document-content,
body.cosmic-active main.content,
body.cosmic-active .quarto-title-meta,
body.cosmic-active #quarto-margin-sidebar,
body.cosmic-active .row-height-fixed {
  background: transparent !important;
}

/* ── Title block + breadcrumb: subtle frosted box, slightly different from intro ── */
body.cosmic-active #title-block-header,
body.cosmic-active .quarto-title-block {
  background: rgba(200, 210, 232, 0.52) !important;
  backdrop-filter: blur(5px) !important;
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(5px) !important;
  border-radius: 10px !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(155, 175, 215, 0.40) !important;
  padding: 0.85rem 1.4rem !important;
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem !important;
}

body.cosmic-active .quarto-title h1.title,
body.cosmic-active .quarto-title-block .title {
  color: rgba(12, 22, 48, 0.95) !important;
  text-shadow: none !important;
}

body.cosmic-active .quarto-page-breadcrumbs .breadcrumb-item a,
body.cosmic-active .quarto-page-breadcrumbs .breadcrumb-item,
body.cosmic-active .quarto-page-breadcrumbs .breadcrumb-item.active {
  color: rgba(30, 55, 100, 0.82) !important;
  text-decoration: none;
}
body.cosmic-active .quarto-page-breadcrumbs .breadcrumb-item a:hover {
  color: rgba(30, 55, 100, 1.0) !important;
  text-decoration: underline;
}

/* ── Responsive grid — layout is controlled by JS (updateLayout) ── */
#cosmic-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;   /* JS overrides this */
  gap: 1.25rem;
  align-items: start;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}

/* ── Intro text box — light grey, 70 % opaque ── */
#cosmic-intro {
  background: rgba(235, 235, 235, 0.70);
  backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
  border-radius: 12px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(180, 180, 180, 0.45);
  padding: 1.5rem 2rem;
}

#cosmic-intro p {
  margin: 0;
  color: rgba(20, 30, 50, 0.95) !important;
  font-size: 1.02rem !important;
  line-height: 1.72;
  text-align: left !important;
  hyphens: none !important;
}

#cosmic-intro p + p { margin-top: 0.75rem; }

/* ── Star canvas ── */
#cosmic-cv-wrap {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;
  height: 420px;   /* JS overrides based on layout mode */
}

#cosmic-cv {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  cursor: default;
}

/* hint is drawn on the canvas; credit is a fixed overlay */
#cosmic-credit {
  position: fixed;
  bottom: 8px;
  right: 14px;
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  color: rgba(210, 225, 245, 0.88);
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  pointer-events: none;
  user-select: none;
  z-index: 50;
  text-shadow: 0 1px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.90), 0 0 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.70);
}

/* ── Bottom page navigation: same frosted box as title same width ── */
body.cosmic-active .page-navigation {
  display: flex !important;
  justify-content: space-between !important;
  /* margin-left matches main.content's padding-left so the box aligns with
     the title block and has the same visual gap from the sidebar */
  margin-left: 1.5rem !important;
  width: calc(100% - 1.5rem) !important;
  box-sizing: border-box !important;
  background: rgba(200, 210, 232, 0.52) !important;
  backdrop-filter: blur(5px) !important;
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(5px) !important;
  border-radius: 10px !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(155, 175, 215, 0.40) !important;
  padding: 0.55rem 1.4rem !important;
  margin-top: 0.5rem !important;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem !important;
}
body.cosmic-active .page-navigation .pagination-link,
body.cosmic-active .page-navigation .nav-page-text,
body.cosmic-active .page-navigation .chapter-number,
body.cosmic-active .page-navigation .chapter-title,
body.cosmic-active .page-navigation a {
  color: rgba(12, 22, 48, 0.90) !important;
  text-decoration: none;
}
body.cosmic-active .page-navigation a:hover {
  color: rgba(12, 22, 48, 1.0) !important;
  text-decoration: underline;
}
</style>

<div id="cosmic-cv-wrap">
  <canvas id="cosmic-cv"></canvas>
</div>
<div id="cosmic-credit"></div>

<script>
(function () {
  'use strict';

  /* ── Config ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  const cfg = window.CosmicConfig || {};

  /* ── Background image via CSS custom property ─────────────────────────── */
  if (cfg.bg) {
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--cosmic-bg-img', `url('${cfg.bg}')`);
  }
  if (cfg.overlay) {
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--cosmic-overlay', cfg.overlay);
  }
  document.body.classList.add('cosmic-active');

  /* ── Credit (image attribution) ──────────────────────────────────────── */
  document.getElementById('cosmic-credit').textContent =
    cfg.credit || 'Image: NOIRLab / NSF / AURA';

  const HINT_TEXT = cfg.hint || 'Drag a star anywhere  ·  Click to focus  ·  Click again to explore';
  const HINT_BOTTOM = 28; // px reserved at canvas bottom for hint text

  /* ── Responsive grid: wrap #cosmic-intro + #cosmic-cv-wrap ───────────── */
  const introEl = document.getElementById('cosmic-intro');
  const cvWrap  = document.getElementById('cosmic-cv-wrap');
  let   grid    = null;
  if (introEl && cvWrap) {
    grid = document.createElement('div');
    grid.id = 'cosmic-grid';
    introEl.parentNode.insertBefore(grid, introEl);
    grid.appendChild(introEl);
    grid.appendChild(cvWrap);
  }

  /* ── Auto layout: portrait → stacked, landscape → side-by-side ────────── */
  function updateLayout() {
    if (!grid) return;
    const vw = window.innerWidth;
    const vh = window.innerHeight;
    const cw = grid.offsetWidth;          // actual content column width
    const portrait = vh > vw;             // viewport is taller than wide

    if (portrait || cw < 560) {
      // stacked: canvas below text
      grid.style.gridTemplateColumns = '1fr';
      grid.style.columnGap = '0';
      cvWrap.style.height = (cw < 420 ? '340px' : '420px');
    } else {
      // side-by-side: text left, stars right, proportional to available width
      grid.style.gridTemplateColumns = '42% 56%';
      grid.style.columnGap = '2%';
      cvWrap.style.height = (cw < 800 ? '440px' : '500px');
    }
  }
  updateLayout();
  window.addEventListener('resize', updateLayout);

  /* ── Canvas ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  const cv  = document.getElementById('cosmic-cv');
  const ctx = cv.getContext('2d');

  function resize() {
    cv.width  = cv.offsetWidth;
    cv.height = cv.offsetHeight;
  }
  resize();
  window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

  /* ── 3-D projection ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  const FL = 520;

  function proj(x, y, z) {
    const s = FL / (FL + z);
    return { sx: cv.width / 2 + x * s, sy: cv.height / 2 + y * s, s };
  }

  /* ── Background depth particles ──────────────────────────────────────── */
  const dust = Array.from({ length: 80 }, () => ({
    x:   (Math.random() - 0.5) * 1400,
    y:   (Math.random() - 0.5) * 900,
    z:   Math.random() * 700 + 80,
    vx:  (Math.random() - 0.5) * 1.8,
    vy:  (Math.random() - 0.5) * 1.2,
    vz:  (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2.5,
    r:   Math.random() * 1.1 + 0.3,
    a:   Math.random() * 0.3 + 0.08,
    hue: Math.random() < 0.2 ? (Math.random() < 0.5 ? 210 : 260) : -1,
  }));

  /* ── Navigation stars ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  const BASE_R  = 88;
  const FOCUS_Z = -200;
  const BOUNDS  = { x: 340, y: 220, zMin: 40, zMax: 500 };

  const NAV = (cfg.stars || []).map(s => ({
    lines:  Array.isArray(s.lines) ? s.lines : [String(s.lines)],
    sub:    s.sub   || '',
    url:    s.url   || '#',
    color:  s.color || '#ffffff',
    x: s.x ?? 0,  y: s.y ?? 0,  z: s.z ?? 200,
    vx: s.vx ?? 0.2, vy: s.vy ?? 0.1, vz: s.vz ?? 0.4,
    focusT: 0,
    oz: s.z ?? 200,
  }));

  let focusIdx  = -1;
  let dragIdx   = -1;
  let dragOfsX  = 0, dragOfsY = 0;
  let dragMoved = false;

  /* ── Tick ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  function tick() {
    for (const d of dust) {
      d.x += d.vx * 0.38; d.y += d.vy * 0.38; d.z += d.vz * 0.38;
      if (Math.abs(d.x) > 800)   d.vx *= -1;
      if (Math.abs(d.y) > 550)   d.vy *= -1;
      if (d.z < 60 || d.z > 820) d.vz *= -1;
    }
    for (let i = 0; i < NAV.length; i++) {
      const n = NAV[i];
      if (i === dragIdx) continue;
      if (i === focusIdx) {
        n.x += (0       - n.x) * 0.05;
        n.y += (0       - n.y) * 0.05;
        n.z += (FOCUS_Z - n.z) * 0.06;
        n.focusT = Math.min(n.focusT + 0.04, 1);
      } else {
        const tz = focusIdx >= 0 ? n.oz + 150 : n.oz;
        n.z += (tz - n.z) * 0.015;
        if (focusIdx < 0) {
          n.x += n.vx * 0.45; n.y += n.vy * 0.45;
          if (n.z < BOUNDS.zMin || n.z > BOUNDS.zMax) n.vz *= -1;
          // Screen-space bounds: keep star centre inside canvas (accounting for radius)
          const { sx, sy, s } = proj(n.x, n.y, n.z);
          const pad = BASE_R * s + 12;
          if (sx < pad || sx > cv.width  - pad)              n.vx *= -1;
          if (sy < pad || sy > cv.height - pad - HINT_BOTTOM) n.vy *= -1;
        }
        n.focusT = Math.max(n.focusT - 0.05, 0);
      }
    }
  }

  /* ── Draw ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  function drawStar(n, i, dimmed) {
    const { sx, sy, s } = proj(n.x, n.y, n.z);
    const r  = BASE_R * s;
    const ft = n.focusT;
    ctx.save();
    ctx.globalAlpha = dimmed ? 0.32 : 1.0;

    // glow
    const glowR = r * (2.0 + ft * 3.0);
    const glow  = ctx.createRadialGradient(sx, sy, r * 0.1, sx, sy, glowR);
    glow.addColorStop(0, n.color + (ft > 0.3 ? '55' : '30'));
    glow.addColorStop(1, n.color + '00');
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(sx, sy, glowR, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = glow; ctx.fill();

    // body
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(sx, sy, r, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(3,8,26,${0.78 + ft * 0.18})`;
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.strokeStyle = n.color;
    ctx.lineWidth = 1.6 + ft;
    ctx.stroke();

    // pulse ring
    if (ft > 0.05 || i === dragIdx) {
      const pulse = r + 7 + Math.sin(performance.now() * 0.0025) * 5;
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(sx, sy, pulse, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.strokeStyle = n.color + Math.floor(Math.max(ft, 0.4) * 88).toString(16).padStart(2, '0');
      ctx.lineWidth = 1; ctx.stroke();
    }

    // label
    ctx.textAlign = 'center'; ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
    const fSz = Math.max(Math.round(10 + s * 6), 9);
    if (ft < 0.4) {
      ctx.font = `bold ${fSz}px system-ui,sans-serif`;
      ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(220,235,255,${Math.min(0.4 + s * 0.7, 0.95)})`;
      ctx.fillText(n.lines[0], sx, sy);
    } else {
      const bigSz = Math.min(Math.round(r * 0.22), 15);
      const lh    = bigSz + 4;
      ctx.font    = `bold ${bigSz}px system-ui,sans-serif`;
      ctx.fillStyle = n.color;
      const subVisible = ft > 0.65;
      const baseY = sy - (n.lines.length * lh) / 2 - (subVisible ? bigSz * 0.85 : 0);
      n.lines.forEach((l, j) => ctx.fillText(l, sx, baseY + j * lh));
      if (subVisible) {
        const t2 = Math.min((ft - 0.65) / 0.35, 1);
        ctx.font = `${Math.round(bigSz * 0.76)}px system-ui,sans-serif`;
        ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(185,210,255,${t2 * 0.78})`;
        ctx.fillText(n.sub, sx, sy + r * 0.28);
        ctx.font = `bold ${Math.round(bigSz * 0.82)}px system-ui,sans-serif`;
        ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255,255,255,${t2 * 0.9})`;
        ctx.fillText('→ explore', sx, sy + r * 0.62);
      }
    }
    ctx.restore();
  }

  function frame() {
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, cv.width, cv.height);
    tick();

    // dust
    for (const d of dust) {
      const { sx, sy, s } = proj(d.x, d.y, d.z);
      if (sx < -4 || sx > cv.width + 4 || sy < -4 || sy > cv.height + 4) continue;
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(sx, sy, Math.max(d.r * s, 0.3), 0, Math.PI * 2);
      const a = Math.min(d.a * s * 1.5, 0.5);
      ctx.fillStyle = d.hue >= 0 ? `hsla(${d.hue},50%,92%,${a})` : `rgba(255,255,255,${a})`;
      ctx.fill();
    }

    // stars back-to-front
    const order = NAV.map((_, i) => i).sort((a, b) => NAV[b].z - NAV[a].z);
    for (const i of order) {
      drawStar(NAV[i], i, focusIdx >= 0 && i !== focusIdx && i !== dragIdx);
    }

    // hint text at bottom centre of canvas
    ctx.save();
    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
    ctx.textBaseline = 'bottom';
    ctx.font = '12px system-ui,sans-serif';
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(200,215,255,0.62)';
    ctx.shadowColor = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.6)';
    ctx.shadowBlur  = 4;
    ctx.fillText(HINT_TEXT, cv.width / 2, cv.height - 8);
    ctx.restore();

    requestAnimationFrame(frame);
  }
  requestAnimationFrame(frame);

  /* ── Hit test ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  function hitTest(mx, my) {
    const order = NAV.map((_, i) => i).sort((a, b) => NAV[a].z - NAV[b].z);
    for (const i of order) {
      const { sx, sy, s } = proj(NAV[i].x, NAV[i].y, NAV[i].z);
      if (Math.hypot(mx - sx, my - sy) <= BASE_R * s + 10) return i;
    }
    return -1;
  }

  function canvasXY(e) {
    const r = cv.getBoundingClientRect();
    return [e.clientX - r.left, e.clientY - r.top];
  }

  function toWorld(sx, sy, z) {
    const s = FL / (FL + z);
    return [(sx - cv.width / 2) / s, (sy - cv.height / 2) / s];
  }

  /* ── Mouse ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  cv.addEventListener('mousedown', e => {
    const [mx, my] = canvasXY(e);
    const i = hitTest(mx, my);
    if (i < 0) return;
    dragIdx = i; dragMoved = false;
    const { sx, sy } = proj(NAV[i].x, NAV[i].y, NAV[i].z);
    dragOfsX = mx - sx; dragOfsY = my - sy;
    cv.style.cursor = 'grabbing';
    e.preventDefault();
  });

  window.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
    if (dragIdx < 0) {
      const [mx, my] = canvasXY(e);
      cv.style.cursor = hitTest(mx, my) >= 0 ? 'grab' : 'default';
      return;
    }
    const [mx, my] = canvasXY(e);
    dragMoved = true;
    const n = NAV[dragIdx];
    const sc    = FL / (FL + n.z);
    const pad   = BASE_R * sc + 12;
    const rawSx = mx - dragOfsX, rawSy = my - dragOfsY;
    // clamp to canvas so star stays reachable
    const tSx = Math.max(pad, Math.min(cv.width  - pad,              rawSx));
    const tSy = Math.max(pad, Math.min(cv.height - pad - HINT_BOTTOM, rawSy));
    const [wx, wy] = toWorld(tSx, tSy, n.z);
    n.x = wx; n.y = wy;
    const ratio = Math.min(
      Math.hypot(tSx - cv.width / 2, tSy - cv.height / 2) / (Math.min(cv.width, cv.height) * 0.5), 1
    );
    n.z  += (FOCUS_Z * (1 - ratio) + 350 * ratio - n.z) * 0.06;
    n.oz  = n.z;
  });

  window.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {
    if (dragIdx < 0) return;
    const i = dragIdx; dragIdx = -1;
    cv.style.cursor = 'default';
    if (!dragMoved) {
      if (focusIdx === i) { window.location.href = NAV[i].url; }
      else { if (focusIdx >= 0) NAV[focusIdx].focusT = 0; focusIdx = i; }
    } else {
      NAV[i].ox = NAV[i].x; NAV[i].oy = NAV[i].y;
      if (focusIdx === i) focusIdx = -1;
    }
  });

  cv.addEventListener('click', e => {
    if (dragMoved) return;
    const [mx, my] = canvasXY(e);
    if (hitTest(mx, my) < 0 && focusIdx >= 0) focusIdx = -1;
  });

  /* ── Touch ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  let tDrag = -1, tMoved = false, tOfsX = 0, tOfsY = 0;

  cv.addEventListener('touchstart', e => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const t = e.touches[0], r = cv.getBoundingClientRect();
    const mx = t.clientX - r.left, my = t.clientY - r.top;
    const i = hitTest(mx, my); if (i < 0) return;
    tDrag = i; tMoved = false;
    const { sx, sy } = proj(NAV[i].x, NAV[i].y, NAV[i].z);
    tOfsX = mx - sx; tOfsY = my - sy;
  }, { passive: false });

  cv.addEventListener('touchmove', e => {
    e.preventDefault(); if (tDrag < 0) return;
    const t = e.touches[0], r = cv.getBoundingClientRect();
    const mx = t.clientX - r.left, my = t.clientY - r.top;
    tMoved = true;
    const n = NAV[tDrag];
    const sc    = FL / (FL + n.z);
    const pad   = BASE_R * sc + 12;
    const rawSx = mx - tOfsX, rawSy = my - tOfsY;
    const tSx = Math.max(pad, Math.min(cv.width  - pad,              rawSx));
    const tSy = Math.max(pad, Math.min(cv.height - pad - HINT_BOTTOM, rawSy));
    const [wx, wy] = toWorld(tSx, tSy, n.z);
    n.x = wx; n.y = wy;
    const ratio = Math.min(
      Math.hypot(tSx - cv.width / 2, tSy - cv.height / 2) / (Math.min(cv.width, cv.height) * 0.5), 1
    );
    n.z += (FOCUS_Z * (1 - ratio) + 350 * ratio - n.z) * 0.06;
    n.oz = n.z;
  }, { passive: false });

  cv.addEventListener('touchend', e => {
    e.preventDefault(); if (tDrag < 0) return;
    const i = tDrag; tDrag = -1;
    if (!tMoved) {
      if (focusIdx === i) { window.location.href = NAV[i].url; }
      else { if (focusIdx >= 0) NAV[focusIdx].focusT = 0; focusIdx = i; }
    } else {
      NAV[i].ox = NAV[i].x; NAV[i].oy = NAV[i].y;
      if (focusIdx === i) focusIdx = -1;
    }
  }, { passive: false });

})();
</script>
```
